allow: Bash(python3 -c " import plistlib, sys data = plistlib.loads\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\) keys = ['VolumeName', 'MountPoint', 'FilesystemName', 'VolumeSize', 'DeviceIdentifier', 'MediaType'] for k in keys: v = data.get\(k, 'N/A'\) print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) def find_media\(items, depth=0\): for item in items: if not isinstance\(item, dict\): continue name = item.get\('_name', ''\) vendor = item.get\('manufacturer', ''\) product_id = item.get\('product_id', ''\) serial = item.get\('serial_num', ''\) media_items = item.get\('Media', []\) if media_items: print\(f'Parent device: {name!r} vendor={vendor!r} product_id={product_id!r} serial={serial!r}'\) for m in media_items: print\(f' Media entry keys: {list\(m.keys\(\)\)}'\) vols = m.get\('volumes', []\) print\(f' volumes count: {len\(vols\)}'\) for v in vols: print\(f' Volume keys: {list\(v.keys\(\)\)}'\) print\(f' Volume data: {json.dumps\(v, indent=4\)}'\) for key in ['_items', 'hub_device']: sub = item.get\(key\) if isinstance\(sub, list\): find_media\(sub, depth+1\) for entry in data.get\('SPUSBDataType', []\): find_media\(entry.get\('_items', []\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) def find_all_volumes\(items\): results = [] for item in items: if not isinstance\(item, dict\): continue name = item.get\('_name', ''\) vendor = item.get\('manufacturer', ''\) product_id = item.get\('product_id', ''\) serial = item.get\('serial_num', ''\) for media in item.get\('Media', []\): for vol in media.get\('volumes', []\): mount = vol.get\('mount_point', ''\) results.append\({ 'parent_name': name, 'parent_vendor': vendor, 'parent_product_id': product_id, 'parent_serial': serial, 'vol_name': vol.get\('_name', ''\), 'bsd_name': vol.get\('bsd_name', ''\), 'mount_point': mount, 'file_system': vol.get\('file_system', ''\), 'size': vol.get\('size', ''\), 'is_mounted': bool\(mount\), }\) for key in ['_items', 'hub_device']: sub = item.get\(key\) if isinstance\(sub, list\): results.extend\(find_all_volumes\(sub\)\) return results volumes = [] for entry in data.get\('SPUSBDataType', []\): volumes.extend\(find_all_volumes\(entry.get\('_items', []\)\)\) print\(f'Total USB volumes found: {len\(volumes\)}'\) for v in volumes: print\(json.dumps\(v, indent=2\)\) ")
